data.title: Inventor from New York creates E Z RAIN KIT for rainy weather, designed for comfort and dryness.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 23, 2025, an inventor from New York unveiled the E Z RAIN KIT, a wearable kit designed to provide convenience during rainy or inclement weather. The inventor aimed to help individuals stay dry and comfortable, with a design that offers protection from the rain. The E Z RAIN KIT is intended to improve the experience of being outdoors in such conditions.

data.title: Fidelity D & D Bancorp declares a 7.5% increase in fourth quarter dividend to $0.43 per share, marking eleven years of consecutive increase.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, the Board of Directors of Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. declared a fourth quarter dividend of $0.43 per share. This marks a 7.5% raise from the previous quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share. Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. is the parent company of The Fidelity Deposit and Discount Bank and is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FDBC.

data.title: ISN® updates ISNetworld Scorecard for improved usability, with modern design and enhanced user experience.
data.description: ISN, a top player in managing contractor and supplier information worldwide, has unveiled the revamped ISNetworld Scorecard for Hiring Clients and contractors. This enhancement showcases ISN's dedication to providing user-friendly solutions aiding in streamlined contractor performance assessment. The updated Scorecard features a contemporary visual layout enhancing clarity and user navigation, while retaining key functionalities. The move underscores ISN's commitment to improving efficiency and transparency in contractor evaluations.

data.title: Mobileye's revenue grew 4% to $504 million, beating estimates, but profits shrink, causing stock drop.
data.description: Shares of Mobileye Global (NASDAQ: MBLY) experienced a slight decline in premarket trading following the release of its fiscal third-quarter 2025 earnings report. The autonomous technology spinoff of Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) cited a 4% year-on-year increase in quarterly revenue, reaching $504.00 million, surpassing the analyst consensus prediction of $480.86 million. This growth was propelled by strong sales of its EyeQ technology to various customers, including Chinese OEMs, as well as successful launches of new ADAS programs and high demand for vehicles equipped with the SuperVision system. Despite an 8% rise in EyeQ sales due to heightened customer interest, a decrease in SuperVision volumes balanced out the increase. The company's adjusted earnings per share stood at 9 cents, aligning with the analyst forecasts. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Coca-Cola Femsa (NYSE: KOF) to announce EPS of $1.35 on Oct 24, past misses, and stock at $85.12, down 0.34% in 52-week. Analyst ratings available on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Coca-Cola Femsa (NYSE: KOF) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on October 24, 2025, with analysts predicting an EPS of $1.35. Market reactions are often driven by guidance rather than just earnings performance.

data.title: American Airlines posts record Q3 revenue of $13.691 billion, beating estimates, and reports a net loss of $114 million.
data.description: American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ: AAL) revealed its Q3 2025 financial results, causing a surge in stock value as the airline outperformed analyst projections for revenue and adjusted loss, while offering robust future guidance. The company posted a historic Q3 revenue of $13.691 billion, a 0.3% YoY increase, surpassing the estimated $13.628 billion. With a GAAP net loss of $114 million or 17 cents per share, the adjusted net loss stood at $111 million (17 cents/share), surpassing the anticipated 28-cent loss. This highlighted effective cost management and demand strength, boosting investor confidence. The available seat miles (ASM) increased by 2.3%, reflecting growth in operational metrics. Other companies like Citigroup, Mastercard, and American Airlines introduced the New AAdvantage Globe Travel Rewards Card.

data.title: Tangoe's mobile device management platform wins "Mobile Device Management Platform of the Year" for the 3rd time at 2025 Mobile Breakthrough Awards.
data.description: Indianapolis – Tangoe One Mobile has once again been honored at the Mobile Breakthrough Awards for the third year in a row. The enterprise mobility solution has been acknowledged for its excellence in the field, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry. This prestigious award highlights Tangoe One Mobile's continued success and innovation, showcasing its commitment to providing top-notch services in the mobile sector.

data.title: FillPoint Health partners with US Heart & Vascular to provide RNAi therapies for cardiovascular disorders.
data.description: In Dublin, Ohio, FillPoint Health, a prominent specialty pharmacy and MSO platform part of Lyceum Health, has revealed a new exclusive partnership with US Heart & Vascular (USHV), the top cardiovascular management services organization in the US. This collaboration aims to improve access, dispensing, and patient support services for groundbreaking RNA interference (RNAi) therapies tailored for rare, inherited disorders within cardiovascular disease. This strategic alliance signifies a major advancement in the field, promising better care for patients affected by these conditions.

data.title: Cordis-X enrolls 25 patients in FASTEN trial for Ladera Large Bore Closure System, aiming for CE mark.
data.description: Cordis-X, a company based in Menlo Park, California, has recently revealed progress in the development of a suture-based large bore closure device designed to provide quick and dependable vascular closure. As of October 23, 2025, Cordis-X reported enrolling the initial 25 participants in the FASTEN trial, marking a significant step towards obtaining the CE mark for their Ladera product.
